name: ShCh-318
events: 15 Oct 1944 At 2257 hours, ShCh-318 fires two torpedoes against a German barge about 12 nautical miles north-west of Pappensee. Both torpedoes missed.
29 Oct 1944 At 2227 hours, ShCh-318 attacked a German convoy near Libau and fires three torpedoes against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 9000 GRT. All torpedoes fired missed their target.
1 Nov 1944 At 0010 hours, ShCh-318 attacked a German convoy with three torpedoes, no hits were obtained in this attack.
4 Feb 1945 At 2200 hours, ShCh-318 attacked a German convoy with three torpedoes and torpedoed and sank the small German tanker Hiddensee (643 GRT) south-west of Libau in position 56°14'N, 20°23'E.
